title: BigBob Peanuts
description: A mod that adds Big Bob Peanuts to the game. The mod has many different flavors of Peanuts.
body:
A mod that adds **Big Bob Peaunts** to the game. The mod has many different flavors of **Peanuts**.

Thanks to those who installed this mod, I will be very happy if this mod becomes popular.

Official Author of the mod: **Du3yadevv**.

**New global update will be on 75 downloads**
